ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AA, AAU, AE) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to (e.g., Energy, Healthcare) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The stock exchange where the stock is listed (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country where the company is headquartered */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* The name of the CEO of the company */,
  "founded" TEXT /* The year the company was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* The official website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount paid on the date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Stock split ratio, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price change record */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price record the change belongs to */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price */,
  "previous_close" REAL /* The closing price of the stock on the previous trading day */,
  "change_amount" REAL /* The absolute change in the stock price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_changes_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the prediction belongs to */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the stock */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* The name of the machine learning algorithm used for the prediction */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* The confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, investor) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* The type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* The duration of the access (e.g., 1 hour, 1 day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the news article is related to */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the news article (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  "url" TEXT /* The URL to the full news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the post is related to */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform the post was made on (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the social media post */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "url" TEXT /* The URL to the social media post */,
  "engagement" TEXT /* The engagement level of the post (e.g., likes, shares, comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., GDP, inflation rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the indicator was reported */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the economic indicator (e.g., Federal Reserve, World Bank) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* The frequency of the indicator (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is related to */,
  "event" TEXT /* Type of event that triggered the alert (e.g., stock price movement, economic indicator release) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "threshold" REAL /* The threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* The type of alert (e.g., price movement, news, economic indicator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* The message content of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)
